title: justicia androsaemifolia
intro: Justicia androsaemifolia, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Blue Rose of Jericho, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Justicia androsaemifolia have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be made by drying and steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
